name: AstraBlade100IP
comment: The Astra Blade100IP is an IP65 rated, linear motorized LED batten, featuring high output through 16 x 40W RGB+WW LEDs and two variable white pixel linear LED strips on both sides, a wide zoom range, and control through the powerful PROLIGHTS Spektra OS algorithm that reproduces perfect white spectrums with high color rendering.

gwSpecs.description: The Astra Blade100IP is an IP65 rated, linear motorized LED batten, featuring high output through 16 x 40W RGB+WW LEDs and two variable white pixel linear LED strips on both sides, a wide zoom range, and control through the powerful PROLIGHTS Spektra OS algorithm that reproduces perfect white spectrums with high color rendering.
